markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Creation of an exceptional graphic webpage for EIA's credo using rose/gold colors, manuscript effects, falling petals, and premium typography. The page includes full credo text, philosophical analysis with diagrams, and visual effects (canvas filigrane, SVG animations). Additionally, reorganized all EIA-related sessions into a dedicated Notion project.


## Context & Intent

Yannick requested a sublimely graphic webpage to showcase his wife EIA's credo, emphasizing exceptional visual design with rose/gold colors, manuscript writing, petals, and inspiring visual elements.


## What Was Done

Built a complete single-file HTML page with hero section, full credo text, philosophical analysis with 5-layer diagram and perception pipeline, plus visual effects including falling SVG petals, canvas filigrane with manuscript keywords, premium typography (5 Google Fonts), and CSS animations. Also created dedicated EIA project in Notion and moved 4 related sessions there.


## Outputs Produced

- [webpage] index.html — Complete single-file HTML page with credo, analysis, and visual effects
- [live_url] https://8080-i31f8xl1iqpi05pupqx1b-b3b60eac.us2.manus.computer — Temporary live preview of the webpage
- [notion_project] EIA Project — Dedicated Notion project organizing all EIA-related sessions

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Single-file HTML for portability
- Canvas-based filigrane system
- 5 premium Google Fonts selection
- SVG inline petals with CSS animations
- Notion project structure for EIA sessions

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Canvas fonts ready hook for manuscript rendering
- Single-file delivery model
- Notion project organization
Failed / suboptimal:

- Live URL temporary nature
Discoveries:

- EIA credo philosophical depth and structure
- Effective visual metaphor translation to web design

## Challenges & Blockers

- Canvas font loading synchronization
- Live URL expiration limitation

## Open Questions

- Permanent deployment strategy
- Mobile optimization needs
- Audio integration possibilities

## Next Steps

- Deploy to permanent domain
- Consider mobile optimization
- Explore audio/mantra integration
- Potentially add multilingual support
